name: DVONN
author: Abstract Games factory
description: DVONN (Kris Burm, 2001 -- the third GIPF project game): a two-phase stacking game on a 49-field elongated-hexagon board. Players first fill the board (3 neutral red DVONN pieces, then 23 White + 23 Black), then move stacks exactly their own height in a straight line to land on top of another stack. Any stack that loses its chain of contact to a red DVONN piece is removed. At the end you score every piece in the stacks you top; most pieces wins.
